_comment: Universal almanac mode (user's chart unknown) · the 12 day rhythms, same for everyone · translated from the Thai original (10 Jul 2026) · meanings follow the classical almanac canon

建.title: Begin Day
建.text: A day for beginnings. Open the new chapter, plant the first stake, sign on for the job, walk into day one, pick the name, hold the launch — all strong today. Whatever starts today carries the momentum of a true beginning. The one exception: digging, demolition, and teardown work should wait.

除.title: Clear-Out Day
除.text: A day for cleansing. Clear out the old, cut the clutter from your life, do the deep clean, start the treatment, drop the bad habit, end the toxic relationship. What you throw away today stays gone — it won't come back to haunt you.

滿.title: Full Day
滿.text: A day of abundance. Celebrations, family gatherings, opening the storeroom, taking in goods, restocking — the whole atmosphere favors festivity today. Funerals and sorrowful affairs, though, belong on another day.

平.title: Steady Day
平.text: A day of even ground. Routine work runs smooth: level the field, balance the workload, negotiate as equals, split things fairly. Nothing flashy today, but everything dependable — perfect for filing work into the system and keeping life's rhythm.

定.title: Settle Day
定.text: A day for agreements. Strike the deal, hold the engagement, sign the contract, book the slot, fix the date. What's agreed today stays settled and lasts. Tie down the things that matter — clarity is today's gift.

執.title: Follow-Through Day
執.text: A day for gripping tight. Chase the backlog, handle the details, hire people, bring someone onto the team, revive the request that went silent. Grind through the list item by item today — persistence and precision beat speed.

破.title: Breaker Day
破.text: A raw, breaking day. Avoid every kind of auspicious event — no launches, no signings, no weddings, no moving house. Today is good at exactly one thing: tearing down and ending. Demolish the old, withdraw the stale, finish it for good.

危.title: Caution Day
危.text: A day on the edge. Walk slowly and think twice. Risky work, heights, machinery, long journeys — avoid what you can, and leave the big money untouched. Today favors staying still, reflecting, and quiet prayer.

成.title: Success Day
成.text: A day of fulfillment. Close the project, hold the launch, get married, move house, start the business — all end well today. Whatever you've worked at for a long time is ready to bear fruit, and the day's energy carries things beautifully to the finish line.

收.title: Harvest Day
收.text: A day for gathering in. Collect money, call in debts, stock the storeroom, close the accounts, receive the overdue deliveries. The current flows in more than out today — bring everything home to its place. New beginnings can wait for an Open Day.

開.title: Open Day
開.text: A day of opening. Open the shop, open the market, start the class, launch the product, fire up the new project. Heaven's gate stands open today for beginnings with a long future — what opens today tends to keep on growing.

閉.title: Rest Day
閉.text: A day for closing up. Seal the leaks, close the books, finish the work cycle, move money somewhere safe, repair what's broken. Today is for storing up strength and shutting things properly. Launches and new ventures should skip to another day.
